intro: This archive contains 54 articles from April 12 to April 21, 2026, detailing supply-chain security incidents. The threat landscape was dominated by the Lazarus Group and TeamPCP, who exploited critical vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177. These attacks primarily targeted the technology, logistics, manufacturing, software development, and cryptocurrency sectors across Global, European, Asian, and North American regions. The reported incidents comprised a severity mix of 8 critical, 32 high, 9 medium, and 4 informational alerts.
